privacy.intro: At Sinezon, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect you.

c1.subtitle: Account Information
c1.text: When you sign up for Sinezon, we collect your username, email address, and password (encrypted). You can optionally provide additional information such as a profile photo, bio, and social media links.

c2.subtitle: Usage Data
c2.text: We store content data such as your watchlist, movie/series reviews, ratings, lists you create, quotes, and your in-platform activity. This data is used to provide you with personalized recommendations.

c3.subtitle: Technical Data
c3.text: We automatically collect technical data such as IP address, browser type, operating system, and session information for security and performance purposes. This data is never used for advertising purposes.

c1.subtitle: Providing the Service
c1.text: The data we collect is used to provide core platform services such as watch tracking, personalized movie/series recommendations, social features (follows, reviews, list sharing), and notifications.

c2.subtitle: Platform Improvement
c2.text: Usage statistics and error reports help us improve Sinezon to provide a better experience. These analyses are performed using anonymized aggregate data.

c3.subtitle: Communication
c3.text: We only use your email address for important notifications related to your account (password reset, security alerts). We do not send marketing emails.

c1.subtitle: Encryption
c1.text: All data is stored on Supabase infrastructure with AES-256 encryption. Your passwords are hashed with the bcrypt algorithm and are never stored in plain text. Your connections are encrypted with TLS 1.3.

c2.subtitle: Access Control
c2.text: Only you and authorized members of the Sinezon team have access to your data. Third-party applications cannot access your data. Row-Level Security (RLS) policies ensure each user can only see their own data.

c1.subtitle: TMDb (The Movie Database)
c1.text: We fetch movie and series information via the TMDb API. No personal data is transferred to TMDb.

c2.subtitle: Supabase
c2.text: Our database and authentication infrastructure runs on Supabase. Supabase is a GDPR-compliant service provider. Your data is stored on servers in Frankfurt, Germany.

c3.subtitle: Vercel
c3.text: Our web application is hosted on the Vercel platform. Vercel is SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant.

c1.subtitle: Access and Editing
c1.text: You can view and update your personal information at any time from the profile settings page.

c2.subtitle: Account Deletion
c2.text: You can use the Settings page to delete your account, or email sinezon@iletisim.com. Account deletion is completed within 30 days and all your personal data is permanently deleted.

c3.subtitle: Data Export
c3.text: You can export your watchlist, reviews, and lists in JSON/CSV format. This feature is accessible from the Settings page.

c1.subtitle: Session Cookies
c1.text: We use mandatory session cookies to keep you signed in. These cookies are deleted when you close your browser or automatically expire after 30 days.

c2.subtitle: Analytics Cookies
c2.text: We collect anonymous analytics data to improve platform usage. We do not use any advertising networks or third-party tracking services.

c1.text: Sinezon is not intended for children under 13. If we become aware that a user under 13 has created an account, we will remove that account immediately. Parents with concerns about this can reach us at sinezon@iletisim.com.

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We'll send a notification to your registered email address when significant changes are made. The most up-to-date version of the policy is always published on this page.
For questions about our privacy policy, you can write to gizlilik@sinezon.com. We aim to respond to your request within 72 hours at the latest.

legal.supportDesc: Sinezon is an independent project. You can support us to help cover server and API costs.

sinezonTurum.q1: What do you want most when watching a movie?

sinezonTurum.subtitle: Discover your cinema personality in 5 questions
sinezonTurum.title: 🎬 What's Your Sinezon Type?
sinezonTurum.typeAksiyonDesc: You want speed, energy and adrenaline. Superhero movies are your go-to watch.
sinezonTurum.typeArthouseDesc: You're captivated by unconventional, boundary-pushing films. You love independent cinema.
sinezonTurum.typeDramaDesc: You're captivated by deep characters and emotional journeys. You love realistic stories.
sinezonTurum.typeGenelDesc: You're a flexible, open-minded viewer who enjoys every genre. Your love for movies is pure and genuine.
sinezonTurum.typeKomediDesc: You look for the lighter side of everything. Laughing and having fun is your top priority.
sinezonTurum.typeNostaljiDesc: Classics and golden-age films are unmatched for you. You keep the magic of the past alive.
sinezonTurum.typeSinefilDesc: You see cinema as an art form. Directorial vision and cinematography mean everything to you.
sinezonTurum.typeThrillerDesc: You enjoy twisted plots and unexpected endings. You watch like a detective.

account.regText: You must be at least 13 years old to register with Sinezon. You are responsible for ensuring your account information is accurate and up to date. Only one account may be opened per email address.
account.securityText: You are responsible for keeping your password confidential. You are responsible for all activity that occurs on your account. If you notice unauthorized use of your account, please notify sinezon@iletisim.com immediately.
account.title: 2. Creating an Account
account.usernameText: Your username must not belong to someone else, contain misleading information, or violate community guidelines. Inappropriate usernames may be changed by moderators.

changes.text: Sinezon reserves the right to modify, remove, or add features, with or without prior notice. The service may be temporarily interrupted due to maintenance, updates, or technical issues. Sinezon cannot be held responsible for such interruptions.
changes.title: 7. Service Changes and Interruptions

contact.text: For questions about the terms of use, you can write to sinezon@iletisim.com. We try to respond to your inquiry within 5 business days at the latest.
contact.title: 11. Contact

content.allowedText: You can share honest reviews and evaluations of movies and series, personal viewing experiences, constructive criticism, recommendations, and discussions.
content.copyrightText: You may not share text, images, or other content belonging to others without the copyright holder's permission. Movie trailers and posters are sourced from official channels (TMDb).
content.forbiddenText: Insults, hate speech, discrimination, incitement to violence, personal attacks, spam, misinformation, copyright infringement, and illegal content are strictly prohibited. Such content will be removed by moderators and your account may be suspended.
content.spoilerText: You must include a spoiler warning when sharing important plot details about movies or series. Content shared without a spoiler warning may be removed.
content.title: 3. Content Rules

disclaimer.thirdPartyText: External links on the platform (streaming services, news sources, etc.) do not belong to Sinezon. Sinezon is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these sites.
disclaimer.title: 8. Disclaimer
disclaimer.userContentText: Sinezon is not responsible for the accuracy or reliability of content created by users. Reviews and ratings reflect the personal opinions of users.

terms.intro: By becoming a member of Sinezon or using our platform, you are deemed to have accepted the following terms and conditions. Please read carefully.

ip.ownershipText: The Sinezon logo, design, code, and original content are protected by copyright. These materials may not be used without written permission.
ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.userContentText: You retain copyright ownership of the reviews, quotes, lists, and other content you upload to the platform. However, by publishing this content on Sinezon, you grant Sinezon the right to display, process, and use this content within the platform for promotional purposes.

law.text: These terms are subject to the laws of the Republic of Turkey. In the event of a dispute, Turkish courts have jurisdiction. For your rights under Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK), please review our Privacy Policy.
law.title: 9. Governing Law

moderation.contentText: Sinezon moderators reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms without prior notice. Removed content may be appealed.
moderation.reportText: If you come across inappropriate content, you can use the "Report" button or send an email to sinezon@iletisim.com.
moderation.sanctionsText: Depending on rule violations, sanctions such as a warning, temporary suspension, or permanent account closure may be applied. For serious violations (illegal content, damaging the system), permanent closure is applied directly.
moderation.title: 6. Moderation and Sanctions

scope.text: Sinezon is a cinema community platform offering features such as rating movies and series, writing reviews, creating watchlists, adding quotes, sharing lists, forum discussions, and social interaction. By accessing the platform, you are deemed to have accepted these terms.
scope.title: 1. Scope of Service

updates.text: We may update these terms of use from time to time. Before significant changes take effect, a notification will be shown when you log in to the platform. Continuing to use the platform after an update means you accept the new terms.
updates.title: 10. Updates to the Terms

usage.commercialText: It is forbidden to use, copy, or publish Sinezon content or infrastructure for commercial purposes on another platform.
usage.fairText: You may only use the platform for legitimate purposes. The use of automated bots, scrapers, or tools designed to circumvent the API is prohibited. Any attempt to threaten the security of the system will be subject to legal action immediately.
usage.fakeText: It is forbidden to rate, review, or vote using fake accounts in order to manipulate a movie or series. When such manipulation is detected, the accounts involved will be permanently closed.
usage.title: 4. Platform Usage
